tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Can.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Can का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I can swim. She can speak English. Can I go? They can do this work. We can meet tomorrow.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Can.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Can का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Can you help me? I cannot do this. He can drive a car. Can you say that again? I can understand this.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वे समय पर पहुँच सकते हैं।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "They cans do this work."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Can.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Can का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She can sing very well. We can complete this project. Can you come today? I can fix this.
